text: Recovery form asked for cause of death. Wrote 'overconfidence with accessories.'
Recovery crew found the Secret Hidden Pocket item and a note reading, 'told you this mattered.'
Medbay stamped me RETURNED MOSTLY. I respect the honesty.
Respawn shower ran cold. Desperanza believes in immersive consequences.
Held a brief eulogy for the backpack. Attendance: me, regret, and one recovered button.
Medbay punched my loyalty card. One more disaster and the ice pack is free.
Recovery team note said 'found face down near obvious warning sign.' Rude, but complete.
Checked the Secret Hidden Pocket first. Priorities remain legally concerning but emotionally correct.
